classification_rationale: This statement imposes an obligation on controllers and processors to designate a data protection officer.
anchor: The controller and the processor shall designate a data protection officer
paragraph_text: 1. The controller and the processor shall designate a data protection officer in any case where:

condition.value: the processing is carried out by a public authority or body, except for courts acting in their judicial capacity

classification_rationale: This clause introduces conditions that determine when the obligation to designate a DPO applies.
paragraph_text: 1. The controller and the processor shall designate a data protection officer in any case where:

condition.value: that a data protection officer is easily accessible from each establishment

classification_rationale: This paragraph grants permission for a group of undertakings to appoint a single DPO, subject to an accessibility condition.
anchor: A group of undertakings may appoint a single data protection officer provided that a data protection officer is easily accessible
profile_gate_override: hc=True overridden to False: no MigrainePredict profile dimension matched in the scoped text
paragraph_text: 2. A group of undertakings may appoint a single data protection officer provided that a data protection officer is easily accessible from each establishment.

subject.value: the controller or the processor (when a public authority or body)

condition.value: Where the controller or the processor is a public authority or body, taking account of their organisational structure and size

classification_rationale: This statement grants permission for public authorities or bodies to designate a single data protection officer under specific conditions.
anchor: a single data protection officer may be designated for several such authorities or bodies
paragraph_text: 3. Where the controller or the processor is a public authority or body, a single data protection officer may be designated for several such authorities or bodies, taking account of their organisational structure and size.

subject.value: associations and other bodies representing categories of controllers or processors

condition.value: In cases other than those referred to in paragraph 1

classification_rationale: This statement grants permission to designate a data protection officer under certain conditions.
anchor: controller or processor [...] may [...] designate a data protection officer
paragraph_text: 4. In cases other than those referred to in paragraph 1, the controller or processor or associations and other bodies representing categories of controllers or processors may or, where required by Union or Member State law shall, designate a data protection officer. The data protection officer may act for such associations and other bodies representing controllers or processors.

subject.value: the controller or processor or associations and other bodies representing categories of controllers or processors

condition.value: In cases other than those referred to in paragraph 1, where required by Union or Member State law

classification_rationale: This statement imposes an obligation to designate a data protection officer when mandated by law.
anchor: where required by Union or Member State law shall, designate a data protection officer
paragraph_text: 4. In cases other than those referred to in paragraph 1, the controller or processor or associations and other bodies representing categories of controllers or processors may or, where required by Union or Member State law shall, designate a data protection officer. The data protection officer may act for such associations and other bodies representing controllers or processors.

object.value: such associations and other bodies representing categories of controllers or processors

beneficiary.value: such associations and other bodies representing categories of controllers or processors

classification_rationale: This statement grants permission for a data protection officer to act on behalf of specified bodies.
anchor: The data protection officer may act for such associations and other bodies
paragraph_text: 4. In cases other than those referred to in paragraph 1, the controller or processor or associations and other bodies representing categories of controllers or processors may or, where required by Union or Member State law shall, designate a data protection officer. The data protection officer may act for such associations and other bodies representing controllers or processors.

condition.value: on the basis of professional qualities and, in particular, expert knowledge of data protection law and practices and the ability to fulfil the tasks referred to in Article 39

classification_rationale: This statement imposes an obligation on controllers or processors regarding the criteria for designating a data protection officer.
anchor: The data protection officer shall be designated on the basis of professional qualities and, in particular, expert knowledge
paragraph_text: 5. The data protection officer shall be designated on the basis of professional qualities and, in particular, expert knowledge of data protection law and practices and the ability to fulfil the tasks referred to in Article 39.

object.value: a staff member of the controller or processor

condition.value: on the basis of a service contract

classification_rationale: This paragraph grants controllers and processors permission regarding the employment status of the data protection officer.
anchor: The data protection officer may be a staff member of the controller or processor, or fulfil the tasks on the basis of a service contract.
paragraph_text: 6. The data protection officer may be a staff member of the controller or processor, or fulfil the tasks on the basis of a service contract.

object.value: the contact details of the data protection officer

classification_rationale: This paragraph imposes an obligation on the controller or processor to publish and communicate the DPO's contact details.
anchor: The controller or the processor shall publish the contact details of the data protection officer and communicate them to the supervisory authority.
paragraph_text: 7. The controller or the processor shall publish the contact details of the data protection officer and communicate them to the supervisory authority.

condition.value: properly and in a timely manner, in all issues which relate to the protection of personal data

classification_rationale: This statement imposes an obligation on controllers and processors regarding the DPO's involvement in data protection issues.
anchor: The controller and the processor shall ensure that the data protection officer is involved, properly and in a timely manner
paragraph_text: 1. The controller and the processor shall ensure that the data protection officer is involved, properly and in a timely manner, in all issues which relate to the protection of personal data.

condition.value: in performing the tasks referred to in Article 39 by providing resources necessary to carry out those tasks and access to personal data and processing operations, and to maintain his or her expert knowledge

classification_rationale: This statement imposes an obligation on controllers and processors to support the data protection officer in specific ways.
anchor: The controller and processor shall support the data protection officer in performing the tasks... by providing resources... access... and to maintain his or her expert knowledge.
paragraph_text: 2. The controller and processor shall support the data protection officer in performing the tasks referred to in Article 39 by providing resources necessary to carry out those tasks and access to personal data and processing operations, and to maintain his or her expert knowledge.

object.value: that the data protection officer does not receive any instructions regarding the exercise of those tasks

classification_rationale: This statement imposes an obligation on controllers and processors regarding the DPO's independence.
anchor: The controller and processor shall ensure that the data protection officer does not receive any instructions
paragraph_text: 3. The controller and processor shall ensure that the data protection officer does not receive any instructions regarding the exercise of those tasks. He or she shall not be dismissed or penalised by the controller or the processor for performing his tasks. The data protection officer shall directly report to the highest management level of the controller or the processor.

classification_rationale: This statement prohibits controllers and processors from dismissing or penalising the DPO for performing their duties.
anchor: He or she shall not be dismissed or penalised by the controller or the processor for performing his tasks.
paragraph_text: 3. The controller and processor shall ensure that the data protection officer does not receive any instructions regarding the exercise of those tasks. He or she shall not be dismissed or penalised by the controller or the processor for performing his tasks. The data protection officer shall directly report to the highest management level of the controller or the processor.

object.value: the highest management level of the controller or the processor

classification_rationale: This statement establishes an obligation for the DPO to report to the highest management level.
anchor: The data protection officer shall directly report to the highest management level
paragraph_text: 3. The controller and processor shall ensure that the data protection officer does not receive any instructions regarding the exercise of those tasks. He or she shall not be dismissed or penalised by the controller or the processor for performing his tasks. The data protection officer shall directly report to the highest management level of the controller or the processor.

condition.value: with regard to all issues related to processing of their personal data and to the exercise of their rights under this Regulation

classification_rationale: This paragraph grants data subjects permission to contact the DPO regarding personal data processing and their rights.
anchor: Data subjects may contact the data protection officer with regard to all issues related to processing of their personal data
paragraph_text: 4. Data subjects may contact the data protection officer with regard to all issues related to processing of their personal data and to the exercise of their rights under this Regulation.

condition.value: concerning the performance of his or her tasks, in accordance with Union or Member State law

classification_rationale: This statement imposes an obligation on the data protection officer regarding secrecy or confidentiality.
anchor: The data protection officer shall be bound by secrecy or confidentiality concerning the performance of his or her tasks
profile_gate_override: hc=True overridden to False: no MigrainePredict profile dimension matched in the scoped text
paragraph_text: 5. The data protection officer shall be bound by secrecy or confidentiality concerning the performance of his or her tasks, in accordance with Union or Member State law.

object.value: the risk associated with processing operations

condition.value: in the performance of his or her tasks

classification_rationale: This statement imposes an obligation on the data protection officer regarding risk assessment during task performance.
anchor: The data protection officer shall in the performance of his or her tasks have due regard to the risk associated with processing operations
span_coverage_truncated: taking account nature scope context purposes
paragraph_text: 2. The data protection officer shall in the performance of his or her tasks have due regard to the risk associated with processing operations, taking into account the nature, scope, context and purposes of processing.
